verify.subject: Confirm your email address
verify.heading: Confirm your email address
verify.intro: Welcome to appgrove. Confirm this address to activate your account.
verify.fallback: If the button does not work, copy this address into your browser:
verify.footer: If you did not create an appgrove account, you can ignore this message.

reset.subject: Reset your password
reset.heading: Reset your password
reset.intro: We received a request to reset the password for your appgrove account.
reset.fallback: If the button does not work, copy this address into your browser:
reset.footer: If you did not request this, you can ignore this message: your password stays unchanged.

invite.subject: You have been invited to appgrove
invite.heading: You have been invited to appgrove
invite.intro: You have been invited to join a workspace on appgrove as {{role}}. Accept the invitation to choose your password and get started.
invite.fallback: If the button does not work, copy this address into your browser:
invite.footer: If you were not expecting this invitation, you can ignore this message.
